basic_details.organization_name: North Eastern Indira Gandhi Regional Institute of Health & Medical Sciences (NEIGRIHMS)
basic_details.short_information: North Eastern Indira Gandhi Regional Institute of Health & Medical Sciences (NEIGRIHMS) Recruitment 2026: North Eastern Indira Gandhi Regional Institute of Health & Medical Sciences has released the official notification for 2 Tutor, College of Nursing posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking education jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age Relaxation: Government servants can get relaxation up to 5 years.

qualification.details: Tutor, College of Nursing: M.Sc (Nursing) from a recognized University.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NEIGRIHMS Tutor, College of Nursing Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NEIGRIHMS Tutor, College of Nursing Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NEIGRIHMS Tutor, College of Nursing Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NEIGRIHMS Tutor, College of Nursing Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NEIGRIHMS Tutor, College of Nursing recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 16th August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Tutor, College of Nursing post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master of Science (M.Sc) in Nursing from a university that is recognized by the relevant authorities.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 35 years. However, government servants may be eligible for age relaxation up to 5 years.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the NEIGRIHMS Tutor, College of Nursing position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email to [email protected]. You also need to send a signed copy of the original application with self-attested documents via Speed Post/Registered Post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the NEIGRIHMS recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹500 for General/OBC/EWS candidates and ₹250 for SC/ST candidates. Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) are exempted from paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Tutor, College of Nursing post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the post of Tutor, College of Nursing at NEIGRIHMS.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Tutor, College of Nursing position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will be appointed at Level-10 of the Pay Matrix, as per the government norms.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a screening and selection stage. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and other eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any experience required for the Tutor, College of Nursing post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any minimum experience requirement for this post. Candidates with the required M.Sc (Nursing) qualification are encouraged to apply.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading. It is recommended to read it thoroughly.
